---
title: "WikiGuess"
description: "Compete with friends to estimate numbers from Wikipedia"
image: "../assets/images/demos/wikiguess/thumbnail.png"
format: html
---

```{=html}
<script>window.location.replace("https://www.wikiguess.io");</script>
```

An estimation game where you can guess numbers from all sorts of Wikipedia excerpts. Play with friends online by creating a room and guessing on the same questions.

[Play here](https://www.wikiguess.io)
